mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${tableName} (id, `type`, statistics_time, client_ip, `method`, url, user_id, param_json, response_time, result_json, error_type, error_message) VALUES (#{entity.id}, #{entity.type}, #{entity.statisticsTime}, #{entity.clientIp}, #{entity.method}, #{entity.url}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.paramJson}, #{entity.responseTime}, #{entity.resultJson}, #{entity.errorType}, #{entity.errorMessage})
